classObjective: Translate verbal descriptions into correct numerical expressions using operation symbols and grouping.
workedExamples: 1-1, Example 1 — Write Numerical Expressions from Verbal Descriptions (Sum and Difference)
1-1, Example 2 — Write Numerical Expressions from Verbal Descriptions (Product and Quotient)
warmUp: Skill activation: translate simple verbal phrases to numerical expressions
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: identifying operation keywords (more than, less than, product, quotient) and their corresponding symbols
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice translating verbal descriptions to numerical expressions using operation symbols and grouping
independentPractice: Practice problems translating verbal descriptions into correct numerical expressions
assessment: Exit ticket: translate 3 verbal descriptions into numerical expressions
capReflection: What strategy helps you determine which operation symbol to use when translating verbal descriptions?
